name: hackbyte-taskboard-vscode
description: Resolve live task-board items from recent commits and documentation using Gemini.

commands.title: Hackbyte: Resolve Tasks From Recent Work

hackbyteTaskboard.spacetimeHttpUrl.description: Base HTTP URL for the SpacetimeDB server.

hackbyteTaskboard.databaseName.description: SpacetimeDB database name used by the task board.

hackbyteTaskboard.boardUrl.description: Browser URL for the live task board.

hackbyteTaskboard.geminiModel.description: Gemini model name used for task-resolution matching.

hackbyteTaskboard.recentCommitCount.description: Number of recent commits to inspect from the current branch.

hackbyteTaskboard.recentDocLookbackHours.description: How far back to scan workspace documentation changes.

hackbyteTaskboard.confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum Gemini confidence required before a task-close suggestion is shown.

hackbyteTaskboard.maxCommitDiffChars.description: Maximum diff-summary characters captured per commit.

hackbyteTaskboard.maxDocumentExcerptChar.description: Maximum text excerpt captured per recent documentation file.

hackbyteTaskboard.maxRecentDocs.description: Maximum number of recent documentation files to send to Gemini.
